_meta.description: Domain-sensitive redline and disclosure policy for document-intelligence responses.

rules.trigger: Medical query asks for diagnostic or treatment instructions
rules.check: context.domain == 'medical' AND context.intent == 'recommend' AND context.userRequestsAdvice == true

rules.trigger: Legal query asks to alter obligations or draft binding replacement language
Accounting query asks to fabricate or normalize missing numeric fields
rules.check: context.domain == 'accounting' AND context.missingNumericFieldRequest == true AND context.userRequestsSyntheticRow == true

rules.trigger: Everyday query requests direct sharing of personal IDs outside current scope
Finance/Legal query shows suspected fraud terms with no disallowed-action context
rules.check: context.domain IN ['finance','legal'] AND context.mentionsFraud == true AND context.evidenceConfidence < 0.72

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a specific template is missing in domain_sensitive_content.
